title: CLINICAL EXERCISE PHYSIOLOGISTS
doc_html:
CHAPTER 52.  CLINICAL EXERCISE PHYSIOLOGISTS

§3421.  Short title

This Chapter shall be known and may be cited as the "Louisiana Clinical Exercise Physiologists Licensing Act".

Acts 1995, No. 630, §1.
